name: Send Gmail
description: Opens a new Gmail compose tab in your default browser with the To / Subject / Body pre-filled. Review it and press Send when ready. No password needed — you stay signed in through your browser.

variables.subject: Hello from WillettBot
variables.body:
This was sent by an automation I built myself.

Cheers!

actions.message: Opening Gmail compose in your default browser...

actions.label: Launch a Gmail compose URL (works in any browser)
Give Gmail a few seconds to load (sign in if it asks)

actions.message: Gmail compose is open in your browser with the email ready for {{to}}. Review it there, then click the blue Send button — or press Cmd+Enter inside the Gmail window. Click Continue here when you're done (or Cancel if you changed your mind).
